sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4287" key="a(li/sxoinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁλίσχοινος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">,=ὁλόσχοινος</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg002:214" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.214</biblScope> </bibl> (codd. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-σχινος</foreign>).</entryFree>
